testActivityLaunchesAndDisplaysTextView() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.WaitingListTest
Tests that the Activity can launch without crashing and that the waitlistCountText TextView is visible on the screen.

Tests that the Activity launches Buttons and typing input bars are there.
testActivityLaunchesNormally() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.EntrantAccountTest
Tests that the Activity can launch without crashing under normal circumstances.
testActivityLoadsFragmentFromIntent() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.EntrantAccountTest
Tests that when the "loadFragment" intent is passed with "eventList", the activity correctly processes it.
testAddEvent_geolocationRequired_true() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.EventStoreTest
Test that addEvent saves geolocationRequired as true when set.
testAddEvent_savesToFirestore() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.EventStoreTest
Test that addEvent saves the event to Firestore and it can be retrieved.
testAdminRoleInitialization() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.AllRolesTest
Tests that the Admin subclass correctly assigns the "Admin" role
testAdminSecurityFlagsCanBeToggled() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.UserProfilesTest
Tests the specific admin boolean logic to ensure the security flags can be safely toggled and retrieved.

Test that all four fields are present in the output.

testCreateButtonClearsEventName() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.EventCreateActivityUITest
 
testCreateButtonClearsEventType() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.EventCreateActivityUITest
 
testCreateButtonClearsLocation() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.EventCreateActivityUITest
 
testCreateButtonClearsOrganizerName() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.EventCreateActivityUITest
 
testCreateButtonClearsPosterURL() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.EventCreateActivityUITest
 
testCreateButtonIsDisplayed() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.EventCreateActivityUITest
 
testCreateFormSwitchDefaultsToOff() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.GeolocationHelperTest
Criteria #1, #3: The Switch defaults to OFF so geolocation is not required unless the organizer explicitly enables it.
testCreateFormSwitchOffMeansGeoNotRequired() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.GeolocationHelperTest
Criteria #1, #3: When the organizer turns the Switch OFF, isChecked() returns false — EventCreateActivity stores geolocationRequired = false, so no location data will be collected from entrants.
testCreateFormSwitchOnMeansGeoRequired() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.GeolocationHelperTest
Criteria #1, #4: When the organizer turns the Switch ON, isChecked() returns true — this is the value EventCreateActivity reads and stores as geolocationRequired in the new event document.
testCreateFullEvent_clearsAllFields() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.EventCreateActivityUITest
 
testCsvHasHeaderRow() - Method in class com.example.myapplication.CsvExportHelperTest
Test that the CSV starts with the correct header row.

Test that delEventById removes the event from Firestore.

Test that each entrant appears on its own line.

Tests that the empty constructor creates a valid, non-null object so Firestore doesn't crash

Test that quotes in field values are doubled (CSV standard).
